spec.title: Pool Used %
spec.description: ZFS performance degrades past ~80% full; keep pools below the yellow band.

spec.title: ARC Size
spec.description: Current ARC footprint out of 128GB system RAM.

spec.title: Demand Miss Rate
spec.description: The RAM-upgrade metric: was 5.8% pre-upgrade, 0.6% after. Red at 5% means eviction churn is back.

spec.title: ARC Size vs Target
spec.description: ARC size hugging a stable target well below c_max = healthy. Target compressing downward = memory pressure returning.

spec.title: ARC Hit / Demand Miss Rates
spec.description: Hit rate should live in the high 90s; demand miss rate near zero.

spec.title: Dataset Used Space (top-level)
spec.description: Used bytes per top-level dataset on both pools. Watch for the runaway line.

spec.title: NVMe Temps (composite)
spec.description: temp1 = composite. Controller/hotspot sensors (temp2/3) run hotter and are not shown.

spec.title: Drive Bay Temps
spec.description: SAS/SATA bay drives. Investigate anything trending above ~45°C.
